AIAI Fitness CoachMinimal training dashboard
DashboardDemo access
Minimal fitness coach

Simple, black and white, easy to use.

The app is now designed to be clearer and calmer, with a clean Next.js structure and a lighter interface that is easier to scan and use.

Try demo dashboardDemo access
Built for training

Workout plan

Generate a simple weekly split based on your goal and training frequency.

Built for training

Nutrition plan

Build a straightforward meal structure with calories and macro targets.

Built for training

Progress tracking

See completed workouts, active days, and a clear fitness score.

What changed

Less noise, clearer actions.

The layout now focuses on the three things most people need first: what the plan is, what to do next, and where to track progress.

Colors are kept neutral, sections are separated with clear borders, and the main buttons are easy to spot.

How to use it

Open the demo, then pick one task.

Start with the dashboard, choose workout or nutrition, and use the coach only when you need advice. The UI stays calm so each step is obvious.

Workflow

Three simple actions

1. Open

Start

Go straight into the demo dashboard.

2. Generate

Plan

Create a workout or nutrition plan with a few inputs.

3. Track

Log

Mark workouts complete and follow your progress over time.
